translation_notes: Signal is an exit-only rule for existing short positions. Exit condition interpreted as 'close > prev_close' to detect price climbing. Entry conditions are not specified in the source text (noted as 'not detailed in excerpt'), so entry_short remains empty. The AEDT pattern and market regime information are provided as context but cannot be operationalized with the allowed indicators. Pattern-specific statistics (success rates, average moves) are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and thus not included as quantitative thresholds.
